caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing a dark navy t-shirt and a gaming headset, appears in a small inset window in the bottom left of a screen. He is positioned in front of a computer monitor and a decorated Christmas tree. The main screen displays a video game interface featuring the text "HARVEST PRESENT" at the top left. The top of the screen shows game statistics, including "173,037", "14,800", "2,343,543", and "LVL 19 (90)". In the first frame, a large stylized "U1" logo is partially visible against a red and yellow background. By the second frame, a player card for "LOGAN STENBERG" with an "RG" position and an "80" rating is revealed. The subsequent frames shift to a cinematic view of a large, three-dimensional "U1" monument glowing with green and blue light against a dark, digitized background. The man in the inset window continues to react with expressions of excitement.
